mapper.select: SELECT id, account_name, password, flag, active, coins, game_master_type, game_master_level, game_master_mac_address, ban_status, unban_date, is_muted, mute_count, unmute_date FROM userdb.user_info WHERE account_name = #{accountName} LIMIT 1
SELECT is_muted, mute_count FROM userdb.user_info WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
SELECT game_master_type, game_master_level FROM userdb.user_info WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
SELECT flag FROM userdb.user_info WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.user_info SET ban_status = 0, unban_date = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.user_info SET ban_status = 0, unban_date = NULL WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
UPDATE userdb.user_info SET is_muted = 0, unmute_date = NULL WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
UPDATE userdb.user_info SET is_muted = 0, unmute_date = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.user_info SET is_muted = 0, mute_count = (mute_count - 1), unmute_date = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.user_info SET is_muted = 1, mute_count = #{muteCount}, unmute_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + (#{hours} * INTERVAL '1 hour') WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.user_info SET ban_status = #{banStatus}, unban_date = NULL WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM userdb.user_info WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
SELECT coins FROM userdb.user_info WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
SELECT coins_traded FROM userdb.user_info WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.user_info SET coins = coins - #{amount} WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
UPDATE userdb.user_info SET coins_traded = coins_traded + #{amount} WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
UPDATE userdb.user_info SET coins = coins + #{amount} WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
